title: hieracium pseudovillosum
intro: Hieracium pseudovillosum, also known as the lesser hawk's-beard or false hoary cress hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family that belongs to the genus Hieracium. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium pseudovillosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its leaves and roots can be used to make herbal remedies for various health issues.
